languages.text: {n}Все идет своим чередом: и штурм объединенных сил {g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}Инквизиции{/g}, и созыв совета. Настает переломный момент, который либо освободит вас, либо обречет на новый виток пытки.{/n}
languages.translation_comment:
Перематываем DL_TimeloopPhase_counter на 13;
сразу телепортируем на совет Себериана

traits.locale_text: {n}Все идет своим чередом: и штурм объединенных сил {g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}Инквизиции{/g}, и созыв совета. Настает переломный момент, который либо освободит вас, либо обречет на новый виток пытки.{/n}

languages.translation_comment:
Перематываем DL_TimeloopPhase_counter на 13;
сразу телепортируем на совет Себериана

languages.text: {n}Everything is taking place as it should: the attack by the combined forces of the {g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}Inquisition{/g}, and the convening of the council. The pivotal moment approaches, and it will either set you free or condemn you to a new round of torture.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Все идет своим чередом: и штурм объединенных сил {g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}Инквизиции{/g}, и созыв совета. Настает переломный момент, который либо освободит вас, либо обречет на новый виток пытки.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Everything is taking place as it should: the attack by the combined forces of the {g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}Inquisition{/g}, and the convening of the council. The pivotal moment approaches, and it will either set you free or condemn you to a new round of torture.{/n}

{n}Everything is taking place as it should: the attack by the combined forces of the {g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}Inquisition{/g}, and the convening of the council. The pivotal moment approaches, and it will either set you free or condemn you to a new round of torture.{/n}

{n}Everything is taking place as it should: the attack by the combined forces of the {g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}Inquisition{/g}, and the convening of the council. The pivotal moment approaches, and it will either set you free or condemn you to a new round of torture.{/n}

languages.text: {n}一切都在按既定轨道推进。{g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}审判庭{/g}联军的进攻，会议的召开。关键时刻正步步逼近，它要么会让你重获自由，要么就会将你拖入新一轮折磨。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Everything is taking place as it should: the attack by the combined forces of the {g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}Inquisition{/g}, and the convening of the council. The pivotal moment approaches, and it will either set you free or condemn you to a new round of torture.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}一切都在按既定轨道推进。{g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}审判庭{/g}联军的进攻，会议的召开。关键时刻正步步逼近，它要么会让你重获自由，要么就会将你拖入新一轮折磨。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Tout se déroule comme prévu : l'assaut des forces combinées de l'{g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}Inquisition{/g} et la convocation du conseil. Le moment charnière approche : soit il vous libérera, soit il vous condamnera à un nouveau cycle de torture.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Everything is taking place as it should: the attack by the combined forces of the {g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}Inquisition{/g}, and the convening of the council. The pivotal moment approaches, and it will either set you free or condemn you to a new round of torture.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Tout se déroule comme prévu : l'assaut des forces combinées de l'{g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}Inquisition{/g} et la convocation du conseil. Le moment charnière approche : soit il vous libérera, soit il vous condamnera à un nouveau cycle de torture.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Her şey olması gerektiği gibi oluyor. {g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}Engizisyon'un{/g} birleşik kuvvetlerinin saldırısı gerçekleşiyor, konsey toplanıyor. Seni ya özgür bırakacak ya da yeni bir işkence turuna mahkûm edecek kritik an yaklaşıyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Everything is taking place as it should: the attack by the combined forces of the {g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}Inquisition{/g}, and the convening of the council. The pivotal moment approaches, and it will either set you free or condemn you to a new round of torture.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Her şey olması gerektiği gibi oluyor. {g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}Engizisyon'un{/g} birleşik kuvvetlerinin saldırısı gerçekleşiyor, konsey toplanıyor. Seni ya özgür bırakacak ya da yeni bir işkence turuna mahkûm edecek kritik an yaklaşıyor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Todo está sucediendo como debería. El ataque de las fuerzas combinadas de la {g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}Inquisición{/g} y la reunión del consejo. Se acerca el momento crucial que puede liberarte o someterte a una nueva ronda de torturas.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Everything is taking place as it should: the attack by the combined forces of the {g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}Inquisition{/g}, and the convening of the council. The pivotal moment approaches, and it will either set you free or condemn you to a new round of torture.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Todo está sucediendo como debería. El ataque de las fuerzas combinadas de la {g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}Inquisición{/g} y la reunión del consejo. Se acerca el momento crucial que puede liberarte o someterte a una nueva ronda de torturas.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Alles läuft ab wie es sollte: Der Angriff der kombinierten Kräfte der {g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}Inquisition{/g} und die Zusammenkunft des Rates. Der entscheidende Moment naht und wird dich entweder befreien oder dich zu einer neuerlichen Tortur verdammen.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Everything is taking place as it should: the attack by the combined forces of the {g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}Inquisition{/g}, and the convening of the council. The pivotal moment approaches, and it will either set you free or condemn you to a new round of torture.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Alles läuft ab wie es sollte: Der Angriff der kombinierten Kräfte der {g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}Inquisition{/g} und die Zusammenkunft des Rates. Der entscheidende Moment naht und wird dich entweder befreien oder dich zu einer neuerlichen Tortur verdammen.{/n}

languages.text: {n}すべては順調に進んでおり、{g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}インキジシオン{/g}と軍の連合軍による攻撃、そして評議会招集。重要な瞬間が近づき、あなたは解放されるか、新たな拷問の輪に引き込まれるか。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Everything is taking place as it should: the attack by the combined forces of the {g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}Inquisition{/g}, and the convening of the council. The pivotal moment approaches, and it will either set you free or condemn you to a new round of torture.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}すべては順調に進んでおり、{g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}インキジシオン{/g}と軍の連合軍による攻撃、そして評議会招集。重要な瞬間が近づき、あなたは解放されるか、新たな拷問の輪に引き込まれるか。{/n}
